nasb.text: Instead, there is gaiety and gladness, Killing of cattle and slaughtering of sheep, Eating of meat and drinking of wine: “Let us eat and drink, for tomorrow we may die.”

esv.text: and behold, joy and gladness, killing oxen and slaughtering sheep, eating flesh and drinking wine. “Let us eat and drink, for tomorrow we die.”

cnv.text: 看哪！人還是歡喜快樂， 宰牛殺羊， 吃肉喝酒，說： “我們吃喝吧！因為明天我們就要死了。”

ccb.text: 但你们还是欢喜作乐， 宰牛杀羊，喝酒吃肉，说： “让我们吃喝吧！ 因为明天我们就死了。”

csbs.text: 看哪！你们却欢喜快乐， 杀牛宰羊，吃肉喝酒，说： “让我们吃喝吧！ 因为明天我们就要死了。”
